name_en: Top-tier original factory with full packaging
name_cn:
Top-tier original factory with full packaging
❤️❤️Mini size
This Dior Groove 20 bag is a new arrival from the 2024 Winter Ready-to-Wear collection, designed by Maria Grazia Chiuri, elegant and stylish. Crafted from pink calfskin, it features a quilted oversized houndstooth pattern, showcasing Dior's exquisite craftsmanship. The leather key charm is adorned with the Christian Dior Paris logo and gold-finished stars, making it unique. The bag opens with a zip lock and key charm. The spacious compartment features an open pocket and a zip pocket for various daily essentials. It comes with a leather top handle and an adjustable, detachable shoulder strap, allowing you to carry it by hand, on the shoulder, or crossbody, making it an ideal bag for daily looks.
Model: 8808
Dimensions: 16.5 x 10x 8cm (L x H x W)
